about.title: About Us
about.who-are-we-p: We are a passionate mobile development enterprise driven by the goal of solving everyday problems through smart technology. Our journey began with the creation of the Pill Reminder app, a tool designed to help users stay on top of their health.
about.our-mission-p: To develop user-centered Android applications that enhance productivity and well-being, delivering reliable mobile solutions that make life easier.
about.our-story-p: In 2023, the company’s founder began his journey into Android development, creating his first commercial app (Pill Reminder) for his final course work in Computer Engineering. His passion for mobile development continued after the end of his work, leading him to continue in the field and seek professionalization.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Help us to continue improving our apps.

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.description: An Android application for helping users to track their medicines doses

features-list.schedule-alarms: Schedule alarms to remind users about their medicines
features-list.receive-notifications: Receive notifications if user does not mark medicine as used in the application
features-list.set-treatment-period: Allows users to set a treatment period or receive alarms until medicine deletion
features-list.daily-notifications: Receive daily notifications after setting a pillbox refill reminder
features-list.list-treatments: List all ongoing and ended treatments
features-list.warn-user: Warn user if he pretends to mark a medicine as used close to the next dose hour
